product_overview: A local-first productivity platform for hierarchical goal management, focused work sessions, structured journaling and failure tracking with dashboard analytics and soft-delete recovery. It emphasizes offline resilience (IndexedDB caching) with optional backend sync and Firebase-based authentication.
core_goals: Enable structured, hierarchical goals (Year/Month/Week/Day) with measurable progress and life-category tagging.
Provide a single active focused-session environment (pomodoro-style) that records session framework data and outcomes.
Capture structured journaling and goal-specific reflections to drive continuous improvement.
Normalize failures by making failure logging first-class and linking failures to sessions/goals.
Deliver an analytics dashboard with trend charts and goal/status overviews while supporting local-first caching for offline use.
Protect user data with a soft-delete (Trash) workflow that supports restore and permanent destroy.
Support secure access via Firebase-authenticated endpoints, but allow local-mode when AUTH_ENABLED=false.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provides bird's-eye metrics and trend charts (completion rates, session consistency) and a summary of goal statuses.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dashboard/metrics?range=30d with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 with trend data and chart-ready series -> GET /api/dashboard/goals/status with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 with counts for Active/Done/Not Done/Skipped

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/dashboard/metrics?range=30d with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable -> GET /api/local/metrics (Dexie cached endpoint) -> Receive 200 with cached trend data

features.name: Goal Tracking
features.description: Create, update, nest, and track progress of hierarchical goals scoped to Year/Month/Week/Day with categories, statuses and custom frameworks.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/goals with Authorization: Bearer token and body {title:'2026 Finance', period:'Yearly', category:'Finance'} -> Receive 201 with goalId -> POST /api/goals with Authorization: Bearer token and body {title:'March Budget', period:'Monthly', parentId:goalId} -> Receive 201 childGoalId -> GET /api/goals/:goalId/progress with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 with progress percentage and child breakdown
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> POST /api/goals without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/goals with Authorization: Bearer token and body {period:'Monthly'} (missing required title) -> Receive 422 Validation Error

features.name: Session Timer
features.description: Start a single active focused work session, track framework-specific session data, enforce single active-session constraint, and record outcomes leading to failures when needed.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sessions/start with Authorization: Bearer token and body {goalId:goalId, workMinutes:50, restMinutes:10, frameworkData:{...}} -> Receive 201 with sessionId and status:active -> PATCH /api/sessions/:sessionId/complete with Authorization: Bearer token and body {achieved:false, mistakes:['...'], improvements:['...']} -> Receive 200 and session summary -> POST /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer token and body {sessionId:sessionId, goalId:goalId, title:'Session failure', notes:'...'} -> Receive 201

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/sessions/start with Authorization: Bearer token and body {goalId:goalA,...} -> Receive 201 with sessionIdA -> POST /api/sessions/start with Authorization: Bearer token and body {goalId:goalB,...} -> Receive 409 Conflict (Active session exists)
POST /api/sessions/start when server auth environment is missing (AUTH_ENABLED=true but Firebase env absent) -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable

features.name: Journaling
features.description: Create life and goal-scoped journal entries for daily/weekly/monthly/yearly reflections, tying in failures and goals to aid reviews.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/journals with Authorization: Bearer token and body {scope:'weekly', type:'life', content:'Reflections...', linkedFailures:[failureId], linkedGoals:[goalId]} -> Receive 201 with journalId -> GET /api/journals?scope=weekly with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 with list including journalId

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/journals with Authorization: Bearer token and body {type:'goal'} (missing content) -> Receive 422 Validation Error

features.name: Failure Logging
features.description: Quickly capture failures tied to sessions, goals, or general life/app usage to create an improvement feedback loop.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer token and body {title:'Missed focus', sessionId:sessionId, goalId:goalId, notes:'Got distracted by X'} -> Receive 201 with failureId -> GET /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 list including failureId

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> POST /api/failures with Authorization: Bearer token and body {title:'Linked to non-existent session', sessionId:'invalid'} -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: Trash & Recovery
features.description: Soft-delete any domain item (Goals, Sessions, Journals, Failures) to the Trash with restore and permanent-delete actions to prevent accidental loss.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/goals/:goalId with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 movedToTrash:true -> GET /api/trash with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 list containing trashed goal entry -> POST /api/trash/:trashId/restore with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 restored:true -> GET /api/goals/:goalId with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 goal resource

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> DELETE /api/journals/:journalId with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 200 movedToTrash:true -> DELETE /api/trash/:trashId with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 204 permanently deleted -> POST /api/trash/:trashId/restore with Authorization: Bearer token -> Receive 404 Not Found (cannot restore a permanently deleted item)

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Performance overview with charts and goal status

features.name: Session Timer
features.description: Focused work/rest timer with framework fields

known_limitations.issue: Local data persistence relies on IndexedDB
known_limitations.impact: Data not shared across browsers without sync
Auth gated routes fail without configuration
